page: Microsoft Azure B8as_v2 is a burstable virtual machine belonging to the Basv2 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor with a clock speed of 3.525 GHz. The configuration includes 8 vCPUs mapped to 4 physical cores with 2 threads per core, alongside 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable.

Benchmark data indicates a strong single-core CPU performance in stress-ng tests, placing in the top 25%. Multi-core CPU performance, PassMark CPU scores, and Geekbench single-core and multi-core metrics fall within the average range. Memory bandwidth tests, including read-only small block, read-only large block, and write large block, also demonstrate average performance. However, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression is a relative bottleneck, scoring in the weak category.

Due to its burstable CPU allocation model, the B8as_v2 offers a cost-efficient profile for workloads with variable CPU utilization. It is designed for applications that do not require continuous full CPU utilization but need occasional bursts of performance. The 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes it suitable for general-purpose workloads, small to medium database operations, static web serving, and lightweight software compilation.
description: Microsoft Azure B8as_v2 is a burstable virtual machine from the Basv2 family, utilizing the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is equipped with an x86_64 AMD EPYC 7763 processor operating at 3.525 GHz, configured with 8 vCPUs, 4 physical cores, and 32.0 GB of RAM. The instance lacks local storage but supports Premium Storage. Performance benchmarks show strong single-core CPU capabilities, while multi-core processing, memory bandwidth, and database operations perform in the average tier. Conversely, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression is weak. Given its burstable CPU allocation, this server provides a cost-efficient resource profile for workloads with fluctuating CPU demands. It is suitable for general-purpose applications, static web serving, and development environments.
og_description: Microsoft Azure B8as_v2 is a burstable virtual machine featuring an 8-vCPU AMD EPYC 7763 processor and 32.0 GB of RAM, delivering strong single-core performance for variable workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure B8as_v2 is a burstable VM with 8 vCPUs, an AMD EPYC 7763 CPU, and 32 GB RAM, suitable for general-purpose and variable workloads.
tagline: A burstable virtual machine combining strong single-core AMD EPYC performance with a balanced memory profile for variable workloads.
bullet_points: AMD EPYC 7763 processor with 8 vCPUs and 32.0 GB of RAM
Burstable CPU allocation model for variable workload demands
Strong single-core CPU performance in stress-ng benchmarks
Premium Storage capable with no local storage included
Suited for static web serving, database operations, and development tasks
